reason_for_call: Triage messages and draft an update.

task_params.target_subject: Lighting notes from last night's run
crew_update_points: thank everyone for the quick adjustments
front wash looked much cleaner after intermission
stage left special is still a little hot on the bench scene
blue cue during scene change should come up half a beat later
ask crew to bring ideas for smoothing the blackout timing

attributes.subject: Lighting notes from last night's run
attributes.body: Hi Joseph, thanks again for staying late. My notes from the run: the front wash finally settled in after intermission, but the stage left bench special still felt too bright. Also, the blue scene-change cue seemed a touch early. Could you send the crew a friendly summary when you have a minute?

attributes.subject: Prop table spacing question
attributes.body: Separate note from me: can you glance at the prop table layout before Thursday?

attributes.subject: Costume rack wheels fixed
attributes.body: Just letting everyone know the rack is rolling smoothly again.
